name: NEOGOV
tagline: HR, payroll, and talent software purpose-built for the public sector
description: NEOGOV provides a human capital management (HCM) platform designed specifically for government and public-sector agencies. It helps cities, counties, states, schools, and public-safety organizations recruit, onboard, train, manage, and pay their workforce in one connected system.

services.name: Recruiting & applicant tracking (Insight)
services.description: Post jobs, manage applicants, and hire for public-sector roles, integrated with GovernmentJobs.com.

services.name: Onboarding (Onboard)
services.description: Digitize new-hire paperwork and onboarding workflows for government employees.

services.name: Performance management (Perform)
services.description: Run employee evaluations and track performance for public-sector teams.

services.name: Learning & training (Learn)
services.description: Deliver online training and compliance courses to government staff.

services.name: HR & payroll
services.description: Manage core HR records and public-sector payroll.

services.name: Policy & compliance management (PowerDMS)
services.description: Manage policies, accreditation, and compliance, widely used in public safety.

faqs.question: Who is NEOGOV for?
faqs.answer: Government and public-sector organizations — state and local agencies, cities, counties, K-12 and higher education, and public-safety departments.

faqs.question: What does NEOGOV do?
faqs.answer: It provides an all-in-one human capital management platform to recruit, onboard, train, manage, and pay public-sector employees.
